== Notes for [[Item:Q114442|Q114442]] ==

http://genealogics.org/getperson.php?personID=I00120956&tree=LEO

b. circa 925

Father Guillaume, comte de Fézenzac b. circa 895

Gersinde de Fézenzac was born circa 925. She was the daughter of Guillaume, comte de Fézenzac. Gersinde de Fézenzac married Ramón II, conde Ribagorza y Pallars, son of Bernard I, conde de Ribagorza y Pallars and Toda Galíndez de Aragón, before 945.1,2

Family

Ramón II, conde Ribagorza y Pallars b. circa 925, d. circa 970

Child

Aba Raimúndez de Ribagorza+ b. c 945, d. a 9951

Citations

[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 289-36.

[S204] Roderick W. Stuart, RfC, 286-36.
--------------------

SOURCE NOTES:
www.dcs.hull.ac.uk/cgi-bin/gedlkup/n=royal?royal11090

"OF FEZENSAC" (AKA ARMAGNAC, A SMALL PROVENCE IN GASCONY)

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
